nodes.context: Mexican criminal enforcer squad composed of gunmen from multiple cartels, originally formed to expel Los Zetas.
Mexican drug cartel, one of the original members of Cárteles Unidos.
Mexican drug cartel, one of the original members of Cárteles Unidos.
Mexican drug cartel, one of the original members of Cárteles Unidos.
Mexican drug cartel, one of the original members of Cárteles Unidos.
Mexican criminal organization, originally targeted by Cárteles Unidos.
Paramilitary criminal organization based in Jalisco, main rival of Cárteles Unidos.
Mexican criminal organization, involved in infighting with La Familia Michoacana.
Armed wing of La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.
Mexican drug cartel, originally composed La Resistencia and loyal to Sinaloa Cartel.
Mexican drug cartel, fought against by La Resistencia.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen from the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel was a founding member of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen from ... Gulf Cartel
edges.context: Gulf Cartel was a founding member of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen from ... La Familia Michoacana
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana was a founding member of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen from ... Knights Templar Cartel
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel was a founding member of Cárteles Unidos.

edges.evidence_quote: originally formed to expel the Los Zetas Cartel from the states of Michoacán and Jalisco
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos was formed to fight Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos' current main rival has now become the Jalisco New Generation Cartel
edges.context: Cárteles Unidos considers Jalisco New Generation Cartel its main rival.

edges.evidence_quote: Infighting between La Familia Michoacana and La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras is ongoing.
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana is in conflict with La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.

edges.evidence_quote: Infighting between La Familia Michoacana and La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras is ongoing.
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana is in conflict with Los Viagras.

edges.evidence_quote: La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras
edges.context: Los Viagras is the armed wing of La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.

edges.evidence_quote: La Familia Michoacana has a truce with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana has a truce with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel is allied with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel is fighting La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras
edges.context: Knights Templar Cartel is fighting Los Viagras.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras
edges.context: Jalisco New Generation Cartel is allied with Knights Templar Cartel against La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.

edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras
edges.context: Jalisco New Generation Cartel is fighting Los Viagras.

edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia was composed of gunmen from the Milenio Cartel which was loyal to the Sinaloa Cartel
edges.context: La Resistencia was originally composed of Milenio Cartel gunmen.

edges.evidence_quote: They were also supported by the local Michoacán cartel La Familia Michoacana to fight against Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana supported La Resistencia against Los Zetas and Beltrán-Leyva.

edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia continued its violent campaign against Los Zetas
edges.context: La Resistencia fought against Los Zetas.

edges.evidence_quote: to fight against Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel
edges.context: La Resistencia fought against Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia made an alliance in 2015 with Los Viagras and remnants of the Familia Michoacana, Knights Templar, and local self-defence groups to expel the CJNG out of the region
edges.context: La Resistencia allied with others to fight CJNG.

edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia made an alliance in 2015 with Los Viagras
edges.context: La Resistencia allied with Los Viagras to fight CJNG.
